tagline: We build websites, run ads, and grow revenue for local businesses that are serious about winning online.
headline: Your Business Deserves a Website That Actually Works
specialty_line: Web Design · Paid Ads · Local SEO
service_1_desc: Professional websites built in 5 business days. Mobile-first, fast-loading, and designed to convert visitors into customers. One flat price — no monthly fees, no BS.
service_2_desc: Pay-per-click campaigns set up and managed for maximum ROI. We target the right people, cut waste, and scale what works. Month-to-month, no long contracts.
service_3_desc: Get found when customers in your area search for what you offer. Google Business optimization, local citations, and content that ranks.
case_1_desc: Complete website rebuild for a dental practice with online booking and a modern brand refresh.
case_1_result: 42% increase in new patient inquiries within 30 days
case_2_desc: New member acquisition campaign targeting fitness seekers within 8 miles of the gym.
case_2_result: 31 new members in the first month at $28 cost per acquisition
case_3_desc: Local SEO overhaul for a plumbing company buried on page 3 of Google.
case_3_result: Page 1 ranking for 14 keywords in 90 days
step_1_desc: 30 minutes to learn about your business, goals, and what's not working right now.
step_2_desc: A clear scope of work, timeline, and flat-rate price. No hidden fees or surprises.
step_3_desc: We handle everything. You review and approve. Your site goes live on schedule.
step_4_desc: We track results and optimize. If something isn't working, we fix it. That's the job.
contact_body: We work with local businesses across the Phoenix metro area. If you're serious about getting more customers online, we'd love to hear from you. No sales pitch — just a real conversation.
notes: Wolfgang's agency demo — Meyer Digital portfolio
